title: Operating loop closeout decision projection

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Implement the first complete #1605/#1606 slice: a shared agentic-workspace/operating-loop-decision/v1 projection embedded into existing compact outputs so agents can see closeout state, safe claim boundary, residue owner, and Memory/Planning/Verification state without a new command or verbose report.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Do not add a new ordinary command, orchestrator, or primary report section. Use enum-backed fields and structured refs only; do not infer state from task prose, keywords, Memory note bodies, plan prose, proof logs, or generated explanatory paragraphs.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Exact builder placement, carrier outputs, schema file shape, and test fixtures, while preserving the packet semantics and compact text budget.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A correct implementation requires semantic completion certification, a new orchestration command, broad evaluation-record machinery, or keyword/prose routing.
canonical_core.next_action: Inspect existing implement/report compact builders, add a pure operating-loop projection over structured facts, wire it into compact implement JSON/text and an existing closeout/report surface, then validate with focused schema and output tests.
proof_expectations: Focused implement/report tests for proof blocker, ready full closure, planning residue, memory residue, and no-prose-routing fixtures.

docs/reference generated only if schema references require it

goal: Make current AW operating-loop state visible and testable in existing compact outputs.
